interactions.stageContent: {"driveUrl":"https://docs.google.com/document/d/mock-touch1-pager/edit","pagerPreview":{"headline":"Transform Your Sales Velocity with Intelligent Automation","formattedSections":[{"title":"The Challenge","body":"Meridian Dynamics faces a growing bottleneck: assembling first-contact pagers takes 5-7 business days per opportunity."},{"title":"Our Solution","body":"AtlusDeck transforms your proposal workflow with AI that understands your brand, your prospects, and your industry positioning."},{"title":"Measurable Impact","body":"95% reduction in first-contact turnaround. 20% lift in engagement. 4x proposal capacity."},{"title":"Get Started Today","body":"See the difference in 30 minutes with a personalized demo."}],"brandCompliant":true,"formatting":{"headerFont":"Brand Sans","bodyFont":"Inter","accentColor":"#2563EB"}},"complianceResult":{"status":"passed","issues":[]}}
